data.title: Bitcoin's price may hit $75,000 by April 2026, currently at $71,497 with RSI at 54.52. TA shows bullish momentum.
data.description: The current price of Bitcoin stands at $71,497, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) measured at a neutral 54.52 and the price hovering close to the upper Bollinger Band. Technical analysts are indicating a potential target of $75,000 within the next 4-6 weeks.

data.title: Bitcoin miners urged to use holdings actively to thrive; Wintermute advises strategy for edge post halving.
data.description: Wintermute stated that miners who view their Bitcoin holdings as an active asset instead of a passive reserve will have a competitive advantage during the next halving.

data.title: Completion of divestment of aerospace business to SpaceX
data.description: On March 13, 2026, in Oslo, Norway, Hexagon Purus ASA announced the completion of the divestment of its U.S. aerospace business to SpaceX. This agreement, initially disclosed on February 5, 2026, marked a significant transaction for Hexagon Purus. The specific financial details and terms of the deal were not explicitly stated in the release.

data.title: DEME concludes contract for Port of Paranaguá access channel concession in Brazil
data.description: On March 12, 2026, DEME finalized the 25-year concession deal with Brazil’s National Secretariat of Ports (SNP) and the National Waterway Transportation Agency (ANTAQ) for Brazil’s Port of Paranaguá. DEME and FTS Participações Societárias S.A. (FTS) jointly own the Paranaguá Port Channel Company SPE S.A., the entity responsible for all activities related to the port. As the second-largest public port in Paraná, Brazil, this concession marks a significant development. Following the conclusion of all necessary administrative procedures, DEME and FTS are now set to proceed with the mobilization and execution phase of the project.

data.title: Saga Prefecture Highlights Events and Openings in 2026
data.description: In 2026, the Saga Prefectural Government in southwestern Japan is preparing to organize numerous events and unveilings. The region will welcome international journalists and media organizations to cover these activities. These events will include several significant openings and initiatives focusing on global environmental issues. Stay tuned for updates on these exciting developments in Saga.
